title: OpenGlobes Space
body:
space.openglobes.com → · GitHub →

A real-time 3D solar system visualization that runs in the browser. It tracks 10,000+ satellites using SGP4 orbital propagation, renders planets with NASA high-resolution textures, and supports seamless multi-scale zoom — from low-Earth-orbit satellites all the way out to the Milky Way.

一个浏览器端的实时 3D 太阳系可视化应用。通过 SGP4 轨道传播算法实时追踪一万多颗在轨卫星，使用 NASA 高清纹理渲染行星，支持从近地轨道到银河系的多尺度无缝缩放。

Features include a full solar system with real proportional scale, 14 deep-space probes with live trajectory lines, natural moons for Jupiter and Saturn, atmospheric glow with Fresnel shading, planet occlusion for labels and markers, and a time-control system to speed up or reverse the simulation.

功能包括真实比例的完整太阳系、14 个深空探测器及实时轨迹线、木星和土星的天然卫星、基于 Fresnel 着色的大气光晕、行星遮挡标签自动隐藏，以及可加速或倒放的时间控制系统。

Built with Three.js and vanilla TypeScript. Part of the OpenGlobes project — open-source 3D data globe visualizations.

基于 Three.js 和原生 TypeScript 构建。属于 OpenGlobes 项目的一部分——开源 3D 数据地球可视化。
